title: Set up Managed Payments
description: Accept global payments for digital products with Stripe as the merchant of record.

steps.title: Create a product
steps.description: Create a digital product with an eligible tax code. <Link>View eligibility requirements</Link>

nodes.title: Create Subscription Product
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

params.description: A basic subscription to our service
params.name: Basic subscription

nodes.title: Create One Time Product
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create Checkout Session
nodes.description: Set the managed_payments[enabled] parameter to true and use 2026.02-25.preview or above as your version header.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete a test payment
nodes.description: Try different billing addresses to see how tax is calculated for customers in different locations. Then, process a test payment using <Link>this test card information</Link>.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Listen for checkout.session.completed
nodes.description: We’ll send this event every time a customer successfully checks out. <Link>API docs</Link>
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
